source.origin: Created directly in the Hina AI repository as original material tint, pose, blink, accessory geometry and stage presentation code.

license.scope: Repository-original presentation source files only; the underlying VRM retains its embedded VRM Public License metadata.
permitted_use: commercial use under the repository license and base-asset permissions

design.palette: pastel sakura, lavender, warm cream and plum
features: pastel skirt layered over the base shorts

files.role: CSP permits only local/data/blob image decoding and local/blob ImageBitmap fetch for embedded VRM textures
fixed local VRM renderer, material palette application, accessory geometry, pose and blink integration
pure deterministic Hina palette, natural pose and blink profile
TypeScript contract for the repository-original presentation profile

status.blocker: Owner manual visual acceptance and a future exclusive/final VRM identity decision remain required before production identity approval.
